channel.title: 6. Race Day :: Hands-on Amazon GameLift: Deploy Your First Multiplayer Game
channel.description: Duration: ~15 minutes Everything is deployed. Two final experiences: prove your own stack end-to-end, then join everyone on the shared arena.

item.title: Verify Your Own Server
item.description: The unified frontend The Pixel Rush client has a built-in server selector. On the login screen: ☁️ AWS ARENA — the official workshop server (instructor’s deployment) 🔧 MY SERVER — any Pixel Rush backend, identified by its API URL Under the hood, MY SERVER calls the target backend’s /api/info discovery endpoint, verifies it’s a Pixel Rush arena, and wires the whole client (login, matchmaking, notifications) to that deployment.

item.title: Race Everyone on AWS Arena
item.description: Switch to the shared arena Time to race real humans. Back on the login screen: Click switch racer if you’re in a lobby, then choose ☁️ AWS ARENA Log in (same name works — arenas have separate player databases, so you’ll get a fresh persona here) Now every participant is in one shared world: the world chat on the right shows everyone joining, and the leaderboard is global.
